title: Token bucket rate limiter
prompt_md:
Implement `token_bucket(tokens, capacity, refill_per_sec, last_ts, now, cost)`.

First refill the bucket based on elapsed time, capped at capacity:
`refill = min(capacity, tokens + (now - last_ts) * refill_per_sec)`.

Then, if `refill >= cost`, the request is allowed: return `{"allowed": True, "tokens": refill - cost}`. Otherwise reject: return `{"allowed": False, "tokens": refill}`.
starter_code:
def token_bucket(tokens, capacity, refill_per_sec, last_ts, now, cost):
    pass
hints: Compute the refilled token count first and cap it at capacity with min().
Compare the refilled amount to cost: deduct on allow, leave it untouched on reject.
